title: HooksManifest
description: Shared hooks manifest for the pi generic hooks-runner extension (ADR-002 D2).

command.description: Command or script path to execute.

SharedLogicEntry.description: Cross-harness hook entry with a script. The script field is the discriminator. piEvent is optional (absent for CC-only PreToolUse hooks). matcher/toolNames carry the CC/pi filter axes as data.

ccEvent.description: Claude Code event name (documentation only; not used by the runner).

matcher.description: Claude Code matcher pattern (PreToolUse-class events only; documentation only; not used by the runner).

piEvent.description: pi event to subscribe to (e.g. tool_call). Absent/null for CC-only entries (no pi analog — runner skips these).

toolNames.description: pi toolName filter. Empty array = all tools (wildcard). Absent for CC-only entries.

script.description: Executable to run. ~ is expanded to the home directory. Required for shared-logic (cross-harness) entries.

scriptArgs.description: Static CLI args prepended before any dynamic arg.

inputArgField.description: event.input field to append as last CLI arg (exit-code/json protocols) or include in stdin JSON (cc-hook protocol).

outputFormat.description: Protocol adapter. Omit for default exit-code protocol. 'json' = dcg decision:deny. 'cc-hook' = Claude Code hookSpecificOutput.permissionDecision. 'system-prompt-append' = before_agent_start injection: stdout appended to system prompt on exit 0; non-zero exit skips injection.

description.description: Human-readable description of this hook entry.

CcOnlyEntry.description: CC-only lifecycle hook entry. No pi analog. ccHooks describes the CC hook commands for documentation. The runner skips these entries.

description.description: Human-readable description of this hook entry.

ccHooks.description: CC-native hook commands. Each item has type (e.g. 'command') and command (script path or shell command). Documentation only — the runner ignores these; they are wired by install.sh into the methodology home's settings.json.

HookEntry.description: A hook manifest entry — either a shared-logic (cross-harness) entry with a script, or a CC-only lifecycle entry with ccHooks.
